name: vault
description: Encrypted key/value credential store for secrets and identity material, protected by LSL_MASTER_KEY.
capability_summary: Securely stores and retrieves sensitive values without committing plaintext secrets. Supports set/get/list for runtime credential access.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Vault command to execute: set, get, or list.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Logical storage key for a secret value.

parameters.name: value_source
parameters.description: Either a file path to read or an inline string value when using set.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Encrypt and store a value from file or inline text.

commands.name: get
commands.description: Decrypt and return a value by key.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all keys without exposing values.
